t-1.notes: feature: findings lifecycle · Fingerprint @ internal/findings/fingerprint.go · stable cross-run identity from class+normalized-file+title, no line number

t-2.notes: feature: findings lifecycle · Store @ internal/findings/state.go · durable gitignored fingerprint-keyed state ledger (tracked/resolved/dismissed) with atomic temp+rename save

t-3.notes: feature: findings lifecycle · Reconcile @ internal/findings/reconcile.go · post-scan fold of fresh items vs prior state (new/folded/regressed), no scan mutation, dedup + deleted-file retention

t-4.notes: feature: findings lifecycle · newFindingsCmd @ internal/cmd/findings.go · shared descriptor-driven 'findings {list,reconcile,<id> --state}' group reused by both audits

t-5.notes: feature: findings lifecycle · security.Ledger.Items + securityFindings @ internal/security/lifecycle.go · registers 'dross security findings', adapter keys fingerprint on Class

t-6.notes: feature: findings lifecycle · quality.Ledger.Items + qualityFindings @ internal/quality/lifecycle.go · registers 'dross quality findings', adapter keys fingerprint on Dimension; c-3 fold-survives-rerun e2e

t-7.notes: feature: findings lifecycle · secure.md/quality.md §6a · post-scan 'findings reconcile <run-dir>' step wires cross-run reconciliation into the audit flow
